summary: Merlin's lair clickable hub + candle VFX + Web Audio SFX + 20 cotes_sauvages cards

T062.title: Merlin's lair hub — clickable 3D interior with 4 navigation zones
T062.vfx: 3 candle flicker + 20 particles each, 80 dust motes, cauldron green steam 30 particles, 3 potion bottles, skull
T062.raycaster: hover scale 1.05 + cursor:pointer, click dispatches zone to callback

T064_candles.title: Candle particle system — 3 candles, orange Points, 20 particles each, upward drift
T064_candles.detail: multi-frequency flicker (7.3+13.1+3.7 Hz), particles reset to flame origin on death, AdditiveBlending

T058.title: SFX implementation — Web Audio API tones wired to merlin_sfx event bus

state_machine.title: BOOT→MENU→LAIR→GAME wired in main.ts
state_machine.detail: runMerlinLair() inserted, initSFXManager() at startup, lair tooltip system
